moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Begins: Qualifying & Main Draw Approaches
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 officially begin on June 29, with qualifying rounds currently underway this week in London.

angles.name: Qualifying Action
angles.copy: Centre Court dreams start here! Wimbledon qualifying is happening now, building the suspense for the main draw kick-off next Monday. Who are you backing for a surprise run?

angles.name: Countdown to Centre Court
angles.copy: The buzz is building in SW19! Wimbledon's main tournament starts Monday, June 29. Get ready for two weeks of grass-court glory right here in London. Who's your champion?

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 is almost here, with the first round beginning on Monday. Who are you hoping to see lift the trophy this year?

moments.title: UK Heatwave Peaks Before Thunderstorm Risk
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing an intense heatwave across England and Wales, with temperatures potentially reaching 38-39°C, before a shift to cooler, more changeable conditions and a risk of thunderstorms by the weekend.

angles.name: Scorching Temperatures
angles.copy: It's a hot one! Temperatures are soaring across England and Wales today, with some areas hitting the high 30s. Stay cool and hydrated out there!

angles.name: Heatwave to Thunderstorms
angles.copy: Enjoy the sunshine while it lasts! The heatwave is set to break with a risk of thunderstorms later this week and into the weekend. Get ready for a change!

angles.name: Local Heat Warning
angles.copy: Devon, it's seriously hot out there! Extreme heat warnings are in place. Look after yourselves and your neighbours. When are you heading for the beach?

moments.title: Love Island UK Season 13 Continues
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13, hosted by Maya Jama and narrated by Iain Stirling, premiered on June 1st and continues nightly (except Saturdays) on ITV2, with all the latest villa drama unfolding.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of drama from the Love Island villa! Who's coupling up and who's cracking on tonight? Tune in to ITV2!

angles.name: Catch Up on Love Island
angles.copy: Maya Jama's got the villa in a twist again! Love Island UK is still bringing the heat. If you're not watching, what's your excuse?

angles.name: Weekend Recap
angles.copy: Need to catch up on all the 'Love Island' chaos? The islanders are still bringing the heat in Mallorca! What's been your favourite moment this week?

moments.title: Solange Knowles Turns 40
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer, songwriter, and artist Solange Knowles, known for her distinctive R&B and soul sound, celebrates her 40th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy 40th Solange
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 40th Birthday to the incredible Solange Knowles! From 'Losing You' to 'A Seat at the Table', her influence is undeniable.

angles.name: Solange's Sound
angles.copy: Today, we're celebrating the one and only Solange Knowles as she turns 40! Her unique blend of R&B and experimental pop has always stood out.

moments.title: Mick Fleetwood Celebrates 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary drummer and co-founder of Fleetwood Mac, Mick Fleetwood, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Fleetwood Mac Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Mick Fleetwood! The heartbeat of Fleetwood Mac, his drumming has given us some of rock's most enduring classics.

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: Seventy-nine years young! We're celebrating Mick Fleetwood's birthday today. What's your favourite Fleetwood Mac track featuring his legendary rhythm?

moments.title: Tears for Fears' Curt Smith Turns 65
moments.blurb: Singer, songwriter, and bassist Curt Smith, best known as one half of the iconic New Wave duo Tears for Fears, celebrates his 65th birthday today.

angles.name: Tears for Fears Birthday
angles.copy: Shout out to Curt Smith of Tears for Fears, who turns 65 today! From 'Everybody Wants To Rule The World' to 'Shout', what's your favourite TFF hit?

angles.name: New Wave Icon
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to Tears for Fears' Curt Smith! His voice defined an era and continues to resonate. What's the ultimate Tears for Fears anthem for you?

moments.title: OMD's Andy McCluskey is 67
moments.blurb: Andy McCluskey, co-founder, singer, and bassist of the pioneering synth-pop band Orchestral Manoeuvres in the Dark (OMD), celebrates his 67th birthday today.

angles.name: OMD Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Andy McCluskey of OMD! The man behind 'Enola Gay' and 'Souvenir' is still making incredible music.

moments.title: Dire Straits' John Illsley Turns 77
moments.blurb: John Illsley, the acclaimed bassist and co-founder of the legendary rock band Dire Straits, celebrates his 77th birthday today.

angles.name: Dire Straits Bassist
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 77th Birthday to John Illsley, the brilliant bassist from Dire Straits! What's your go-to Dire Straits track?

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger Turns 48
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and television personality Nicole Scherzinger, best known as the lead singer of The Pussycat Dolls, celebrates her 48th birthday on June 29.

angles.name: Pussycat Doll's Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 on Saturday. What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls hit to get you moving?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Happy Birthday weekend to Nicole Scherzinger! The multi-talented star turns 48 on Saturday. From solo hits to The Pussycat Dolls, her career is 🔥.

moments.title: Deep Purple's Ian Paice is 78
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the only continuous member of the legendary hard rock band Deep Purple and one of rock's most influential drummers, celebrates his 78th birthday on June 29.

angles.name: Deep Purple Drummer
angles.copy: Wishing a thunderous Happy 78th Birthday to Ian Paice, the incredible drummer of Deep Purple! A true rock legend.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to Deep Purple's Ian Paice, turning 78 on Saturday! His drumming shaped generations of rock music. What's your favourite Deep Purple track?

moments.title: Men at Work's Colin Hay Turns 73
moments.blurb: Scottish-Australian musician Colin Hay, best known as the frontman of the Grammy-winning band Men at Work, celebrates his 73rd birthday on June 29.

angles.name: Men at Work Legend
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the voice of Men at Work, Colin Hay! From 'Down Under' to 'Who Can It Be Now?', his songs are timeless.

angles.name: Aussie Icon
angles.copy: Turning 73 on Saturday is the brilliant Colin Hay! The Men at Work frontman has given us some absolute classics. Which one is on repeat for you?

moments.title: Katherine Jenkins Turns 46
moments.blurb: Welsh mezzo-soprano and classical crossover star Katherine Jenkins celebrates her 46th birthday on June 29.

angles.name: Welsh Star
angles.copy: Penblwydd Hapus to our very own Katherine Jenkins! The Welsh mezzo-soprano turns 46 on Saturday. What's your favourite performance of hers?

angles.name: Classical Crossover
angles.copy: Happy 46th Birthday to the stunning Katherine Jenkins on Saturday! A voice that truly captivates.

moments.title: Missy Elliott Turns 55
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott, a true pioneer in hip-hop and R&B, celebrates her 55th birthday on July 1.

angles.name: Hip Hop Royalty
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! The legendary Missy Elliott turns 55 on Wednesday, July 1st. A true innovator who changed the game.

angles.name: Game Changer
angles.copy: Fifty-five years young for the one and only Missy Elliott on Wednesday! Her impact on music is immeasurable. What's your top Missy track?

moments.title: Blondie's Debbie Harry Turns 81
moments.blurb: Iconic singer, songwriter, and lead vocalist of Blondie, Debbie Harry, celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1.

angles.name: Blondie Icon
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the legendary Debbie Harry of Blondie on Wednesday! Still rockin' and still iconic. What's your favourite Blondie hit?

angles.name: Punk Queen
angles.copy: Eighty-one years young! Wishing the incredible Debbie Harry a very Happy Birthday on July 1st. A true pioneer of punk and new wave.

moments.title: Dan Aykroyd Turns 74
moments.blurb: Actor, comedian, and musician Dan Aykroyd, known for his work on Saturday Night Live, The Blues Brothers, and Ghostbusters, celebrates his 74th birthday on July 1.

angles.name: Blues Brother's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 74th Birthday to the one and only Dan Aykroyd on July 1st! From Elwood Blues to Ghostbusters, a true entertainer.
